creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Recent update of port devel/tex-kpathsea fails with the following conflict:

[...]
===>  Installing for tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1
===>   Registering installation for tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1 as automatic
Installing tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1...
pkg-static: tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1 conflicts with texlive-base-20140525_3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/kpsewhere
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/tex-kpathsea
